emailTemplates.subject: Industry Referral - AI Consulting Automation for Lisa Feldman
emailTemplates.body:
Hi Lisa,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out regarding AI-powered business automation for Feldman.

A mutual industry contact mentioned your consulting business and the challenges with manual report generation. Our AI agents can automate this process entirely.

Our platform has helped businesses like Tax4Us achieve:
• 50% reduction in manual tasks
• 3x faster content creation
• Automated customer communication
• Real-time analytics and reporting

Would you be interested in a 15-minute demo to see how we can automate your industry contact referral for consulting automation?

Best regards,
Shai Friedman
Rensto - AI Business Automation
emailTemplates.followUp:
Hi Lisa,

I wanted to follow up on my previous email about AI automation for Feldman.

If you haven't had a chance to review our proposal yet, I'd be happy to:
• Schedule a personalized demo
• Provide case studies from similar businesses
• Discuss your specific automation needs

What would work best for you?

Best regards,
Shai Friedman
Rensto - AI Business Automation
